Users are suggesting new features and improvements to the existing ones to make the app more user-friendly and efficient. They are providing specific ideas and examples of how the app can be enhanced.
quotes: Some features are very much needed, which can make this app perfect
The portfolio analysis system needs to be improved
introduce options of adjusting watchlist as per user preferred
action_ideas: Add sorting options for GTT orders and watchlists
Introduce a feature to indicate active orders on the stock page
Improve the portfolio analysis system with more accurate calculations and visual representations
Add a search option in trigger orders list
Allow users to adjust watchlist as per their preference
